productDisplayName: Puma Women Grey Rio Fashion Sandals
description: Style NoteThese stylish floaters from puma make a trendy style statement combined with superior performance. These are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style. You can also team this pair with jeans and tees for a great casual look.Product DetailsGrey and pink floater with a TPU footbed with ankle loops and forefoot straps that have Velcro closures, honeycomb texturing on the footbed, TPU outsole with aggressive lugs and nubsMaterial and CareSyntheticsWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
